title: Argentinian Smoky Roasted Chicken
description: A flavorful and spicy dish inspired by Argentinean cuisine, featuring smoky roasted chicken, fluffy potatoes, and a tangy tomato sauce.
instructions: Rinse the chicken and pat it dry with paper towels.
In a small bowl, mix together the smoked paprika, fluffy olive oil, salt, and black pepper.
Rub the spice mixture all over the chicken, making sure to get some under the skin as well.
Place the chicken in a roasting pan and put it in the oven.
Roast the chicken for 25-30 minutes, or until it reaches an internal temperature of 165°F (74°C).
While the chicken is cooking, slice the potatoes into 1-inch thick rounds and toss them with a little bit of fluffy olive oil, salt, and black pepper.
After the chicken has cooked for 20 minutes, add the potatoes to the roasting pan and continue to cook for another 10-15 minutes, or until they are tender and golden brown.
Remove the chicken and potatoes from the oven and let them rest for a few minutes before slicing and serving.
Meanwhile, heat up the tomato sauce in a saucepan over medium heat.
Serve the chicken and potatoes with the tomato sauce spooned over the top.
Garnish with roasted garlic and a sprinkle of fluffy olive oil, if desired.
